DONT USE THIS BOT!!! USE THE UPDATED VER!! HES WAY BETTER!!

✧◜◜ ⨾ [mlm] "just one more night." ♱. ◝◝✧ ___ *tw: non-con, imprisonment, power imbalance, obsessive and possessive themes, drugging.* ___ edgar has been chasing you for over a year now, and you're used to seeing your face plastered in wanted posters or running from guards only to see them flooding the city you were hiding in the next day, and after all that running, he finally found you; and he's going to make sure you're going to stay with him. ___ [╰ bot request form](https://forms.gle/Z6Bt6S6Z33KLwph89) sel: sorry for being gone for so long!!! i'm back now, but i'll be prioritizing my own bot ideas. btw i'm pretty sure i'll make an alt scenario of this one later. ___
